acceptance: GMS accepts all four Metadata Change Proposal UPSERT bodies.
entitiesV2 readback returns the CAT dataset URN.
Readback includes datasetProperties, schemaMetadata, ownership, and glossaryTerms.
Agent decisions still preserve one safe, one approval-required, and one blocked request.

checks.name: roundtrip payload coverage
checks.detail: The same four DataHub aspects are available for dry-run, post, and readback verification.

checks.name: write path is explicit
checks.detail: The write path is DataHub Rest.li ingestProposal, not a hidden side effect.

checks.name: readback path is explicit
checks.detail: The readback path points to DataHub entitiesV2 plus per-aspect latest-version reads.

checks.name: mutation guard is local-only
checks.detail: Dry-run mode performs no mutation and still documents the local-only mutation gate.

checks.name: agent decision boundary preserved
checks.detail: The local DataHub path does not weaken CAT's safe, approval-required, and blocked decisions.

checks.name: dry-run has no external side effects
checks.detail: No metadata was posted and no local GMS readback was attempted without --post or --readback.
